prompt_text: Create a meal plan to help with weight loss.
response_text:
Here's a sample 7-day meal plan that can help with weight loss. This meal plan is tailored to provide approximately 1500-1700 calories per day, with a balance of protein, healthy fats, and complex carbohydrates.

**Monday**

* Breakfast: Oatmeal with banana, almond milk, and walnuts (300 calories)
	+ 1 cup cooked oatmeal
	+ 1 medium banana
	+ 1 cup almond milk
	+ 1 oz chopped walnuts
* Snack: Carrot sticks with hummus (100 calories)
	+ 4-5 carrot sticks
	+ 2 tbsp hummus
* Lunch: Grilled chicken breast with quinoa and steamed vegetables (400 calories)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 1/2 cup cooked quinoa
	+ 1 cup steamed mixed vegetables
* Snack: Apple slices with peanut butter (150 calories)
	+ 1 medium apple
	+ 2 tbsp peanut butter
* Dinner: Baked salmon with roasted sweet potatoes and green beans (500 calories)
	+ 4 oz baked salmon
	+ 1 medium sweet potato
	+ 1 cup green beans

**Tuesday**

* Breakfast: Greek yogurt with berries and granola (300 calories)
	+ 6 oz Greek yogurt
	+ 1/2 cup mixed berries
	+ 2 tbsp granola
* Snack: Hard-boiled egg and cherry tomatoes (100 calories)
	+ 1 hard-boiled egg
	+ 1/2 cup cherry tomatoes
* Lunch: Turkey and avocado wrap (450 calories)
	+ 1 whole wheat tortilla
	+ 2 oz sliced turkey breast
	+ 1/2 avocado
	+ 1 cup mixed greens
* Snack: Cottage cheese with cucumber slices (150 calories)
	+ 1/2 cup cottage cheese
	+ 1/2 cup sliced cucumber
* Dinner: Grilled chicken breast with roasted broccoli and brown rice (500 calories)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 1 cup roasted broccoli
	+ 1/2 cup cooked brown rice

**Wednesday**

* Breakfast: Smoothie bowl with banana, spinach, and almond milk (350 calories)
	+ 1 medium banana
	+ 1 cup frozen spinach
	+ 1 cup almond milk
	+ 1/2 cup sliced almonds
* Snack: Rice cakes with almond butter and banana slices (150 calories)
	+ 2 rice cakes
	+ 2 tbsp almond butter
	+ 1 medium banana
* Lunch: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens and whole wheat pita (400 calories)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 2 cups mixed greens
	+ 1 whole wheat pita
* Snack: Protein bar (120 calories)
* Dinner: Shrimp and vegetable stir-fry with brown rice (500 calories)
	+ 4 oz cooked shrimp
	+ 1 cup mixed vegetables
	+ 1/2 cup cooked brown rice

**Thursday**

* Breakfast: Scrambled eggs with whole wheat toast and mixed berries (250 calories)
	+ 2 scrambled eggs
	+ 1 slice whole wheat toast
	+ 1/2 cup mixed berries
* Snack: Carrot sticks with hummus (100 calories)
	+ 4-5 carrot sticks
	+ 2 tbsp hummus
* Lunch: Grilled chicken Caesar salad (400 calories)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 2 cups mixed greens
	+ 1/4 cup Caesar dressing
* Snack: Apple slices with peanut butter (150 calories)
	+ 1 medium apple
	+ 2 tbsp peanut butter
* Dinner: Baked chicken breast with roasted asparagus and quinoa (500 calories)
	+ 4 oz baked chicken breast
	+ 1 cup roasted asparagus
	+ 1/2 cup cooked quinoa

**Friday**

* Breakfast: Oatmeal with banana and almond milk (300 calories)
	+ 1 cup cooked oatmeal
	+ 1 medium banana
	+ 1 cup almond milk
* Snack: Hard-boiled egg and cherry tomatoes (100 calories)
	+ 1 hard-boiled egg
	+ 1/2 cup cherry tomatoes
* Lunch: Turkey and cheese sandwich on whole wheat bread (450 calories)
	+ 2 slices whole wheat bread
	+ 2 oz sliced turkey breast
	+ 1 oz sliced cheese
	+ 1 cup mixed greens
* Snack: Greek yogurt with honey and almonds (150 calories)
	+ 6 oz Greek yogurt
	+ 1 tbsp honey
	+ 1 oz sliced almonds
* Dinner: Grilled salmon with roasted Brussels sprouts and sweet potatoes (500 calories)
	+ 4 oz grilled salmon
	+ 1 cup roasted Brussels sprouts
	+ 1 medium sweet potato

**Saturday**

* Breakfast: Avocado toast with scrambled eggs (300 calories)
	+ 1 slice whole wheat toast
	+ 1/2 avocado
	+ 2 scrambled eggs
* Snack: Rice cakes with almond butter and banana slices (150 calories)
	+ 2 rice cakes
	+ 2 tbsp almond butter
	+ 1 medium banana
* Lunch: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens and whole wheat wrap (400 calories)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 2 cups mixed greens
	+ 1 whole wheat wrap
* Snack: Protein bar (120 calories)
* Dinner: Shrimp and vegetable stir-fry with brown rice (500 calories)
	+ 4 oz cooked shrimp
	+ 1 cup mixed vegetables
	+ 1/2 cup cooked brown rice

**Sunday**

* Breakfast: Breakfast burrito with scrambled eggs, black beans, and avocado (350 calories)
	+ 1 whole wheat tortilla
	+ 2 scrambled eggs
	+ 1/2 cup cooked black beans
	+ 1/2 avocado
* Snack: Carrot sticks with hummus (100 calories)
	+ 4-5 carrot sticks
	+ 2 tbsp hummus
* Lunch: Grilled chicken Caesar salad (400 calories)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 2 cups mixed greens
	+ 1/4 cup Caesar dressing
* Snack: Apple slices with peanut butter (150 calories)
	+ 1 medium apple
	+ 2 tbsp peanut butter
* Dinner: Baked chicken breast with roasted broccoli and quinoa (500 calories)
	+ 4 oz baked chicken breast
	+ 1 cup roasted broccoli
	+ 1/2 cup cooked quinoa

**Tips and Reminders**

* Drink at least 8 cups of water per day
* Incorporate physical activity, such as walking or jogging, for at least 30 minutes per day
* Eat slowly and mindfully, savoring each bite
* Get enough sleep, aiming for 7-8 hours per night
* Reduce stress through meditation, deep breathing, or yoga

**Remember**

* This meal plan
